page_content:
Prerequisite: ENAE414; and permission of instructor.

Credit Only Granted for: ENAE672 or ENAE675.

Formerly: ENAE672.

ENAE676 Turbulence (3 Credits)

Physical and statistical descriptions of turbulence; review of phenomenological theories for turbulent flows; scales of motion; correlations and spectra; homogeneous turbulent flows; inhomogeneous shear flows; turbulent flows in pipes and channels; turbulent boundary layers; theory of methods for turbulent flows (Reynolds stress equations, LES, DES, DNS); experimental methods for turbulence measurements. Prerequisite: ENAE673.
